untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires explicit geometric detection of converging trend lines forming diamond shape and U-shaped/dome-shaped volume characteristics. These specific shape patterns cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. Exit rule (measure rule using formation height) is also not defined in source material. Conversion uses proxies: bb_bandwidth for converging range, dc_lower for downward breakout, vol_ratio_20 for volume confirmation, but the diamond geometry detection is not translatable.
